'''bobayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombiefied|zombiefied]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombiefied|zombiefied]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bobayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobayithi|bobayithi]] || [[word:bobayiji|bobayiji]] || [[word:bobayishi|bobayishi]] || [[word:bobayiki|bobayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobayuthuthu|bobayuthuthu]] || [[word:bobayujuju|bobayujuju]] || [[word:bobayushushu|bobayushushu]] || [[word:bobayukuku|bobayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobayuthu|bobayuthu]] || [[word:bobayuju|bobayuju]] || [[word:bobayushu|bobayushu]] || [[word:bobayuku|bobayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobayufthuf|bobayufthuf]] || [[word:bobayufjuf|bobayufjuf]] || [[word:bobayufshuf|bobayufshuf]] || [[word:bobayufkuf|bobayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobayethe|bobayethe]] || [[word:bobayeje|bobayeje]] || [[word:bobayeshe|bobayeshe]] || [[word:bobayeke|bobayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobayothotho|bobayothotho]] || [[word:bobayojojo|bobayojojo]] || [[word:bobayoshosho|bobayoshosho]] || [[word:bobayokoko|bobayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobayotho|bobayotho]] || [[word:bobayojo|bobayojo]] || [[word:bobayosho|bobayosho]] || [[word:bobayoko|bobayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobayofthof|bobayofthof]] || [[word:bobayofjof|bobayofjof]] || [[word:bobayofshof|bobayofshof]] || [[word:bobayofkof|bobayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfthÃŸf|bobayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfjÃŸf|bobayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfshÃŸf|bobayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfkÃŸf|bobayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bobayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bobayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bobayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bobayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfthÃŸf|bobayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfjÃŸf|bobayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfshÃŸf|bobayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfkÃŸf|bobayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfthÃŸf|bobayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfjÃŸf|bobayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfshÃŸf|bobayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobayÃŸfkÃŸf|bobayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobayÃḊthÃḊ|bobayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bobayÃḊjÃḊ|bobayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bobayÃḊshÃḊ|bobayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bobayÃḊkÃḊ|bobayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobayathatha|bobayathatha]] || [[word:bobayajaja|bobayajaja]] || [[word:bobayashasha|bobayashasha]] || [[word:bobayakaka|bobayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobayatha|bobayatha]] || [[word:bobayaja|bobayaja]] || [[word:bobayasha|bobayasha]] || [[word:bobayaka|bobayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobayafthaf|bobayafthaf]] || [[word:bobayafjaf|bobayafjaf]] || [[word:bobayafshaf|bobayafshaf]] || [[word:bobayafkaf|bobayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bobayasha|bobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobayshÃḋsha|bobayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobayrosha|bobayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobaymusha|bobaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobayasha|bobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobaynkshÃḋsha|gobobaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobaynkrosha|gobobaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobaynkmusha|gobobaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobaynkyasha|gobobaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bobabayasha|bobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobabayshÃḋsha|bobabayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobabayrosha|bobabayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobabaymusha|bobabaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobabayasha|bobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobabaynkshÃḋsha|gobobabaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobabaynkrosha|gobobabaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobabaynkmusha|gobobabaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobabaynkyasha|gobobabaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bebÃḊyasha|bebÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bebÃḊyshÃḋsha|bebÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bebÃḊyrosha|bebÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bebÃḊymusha|bebÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bebÃḊyasha|bebÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobebÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gobebÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobebÃḊynkrosha|gobebÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobebÃḊynkmusha|gobebÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobebÃḊynkyasha|gobebÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bobfayasha|bobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobfayshÃḋsha|bobfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobfayrosha|bobfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobfaymusha|bobfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobfayasha|bobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobfaynkshÃḋsha|gobobfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobfaynkrosha|gobobfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobfaynkmusha|gobobfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobfaynkyasha|gobobfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
